chapter_title.ar: باب مَا يُبْسَطُ فِي اللَّحْدِ وَ وَضْعِ اللَّبِنِ وَ الْآجُرِّ وَ السَّاجِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 65 – What is levelled off in the chasm (Lahad), and placing of the slab, and the brick, and the wood

text: سَمِعْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) يَقُولُ جَعَلَ عَلِيٌّ ( عليه السلام ) عَلَى قَبْرِ النَّبِيِّ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) لَبِناً فَقُلْتُ أَ رَأَيْتَ إِنْ جَعَلَ الرَّجُلُ عَلَيْهِ آجُرّاً هَلْ يَضُرُّ الْمَيِّتَ قَالَ لَا .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ali Bin Al Hakam, from Husayn Bin Usman, from Ibn Muskan, from Aban Bin Taghlib who said,

‘I heard Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> saying: ‘Ali<sup>asws</sup> made a slab to be upon the grave of the Prophet<sup>saww</sup>’. So I said, ‘What is your<sup>asws</sup> view if the man were to make a brick to be upon him, would it harm the deceased?’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘No’.
